title: जातकभङ्गाध्यायः
content:
जातकपारिजाते षष्ठोऽध्यायः
॥ जातकभङ्गाध्यायः ॥
Adhyaya VI.
MARRING OF A HOROSCOPE.
Six slokas, viz. Nos,. 48, 49, 50, 52, 99 and 100 have been
taken from Brihat Jataka.
केचिद्योगा राजयोगस्य भङ्गाः
केचिद्रेका नाम दारित्र्ययोगाः ।
केचित् प्रेष्याः के च केमद्रमाख्या-
स्त चत्वारो जातभङ्गाकराः स्युः ॥ १ ॥
Sloka 1. There are certain planetary conjunctions
which mar those leading to royal fortunes. There are
others named रेका (Reka) which produce poverty. Some
again which are called प्रेष्य (Preshya) i.c. those leading to
dependence and servitude. And lastly, there are those
called केमद्रम (Kemadruma). These four classes of yogas
د
abound in fortunes marred just as they were going to
rise.
मेषे जूकनवांशके दिनकरे पापेक्षिते निर्धनः
कन्याराशिगते यदा भृगुसुते कन्यांशके भिक्षुकः ।
नीचर्थे त्वतिनीचभागसहिते जातो दिवानायके
राजश्रेष्ठक्कुलाग्रजोऽपि विगतश्रीपुत्रदाराशनः ॥ २ ॥
319
verses:
केचिद्योगा राजयोगस्य भङ्गाः
केचिद्रेका नाम दारित्र्ययोगाः ।
केचित् प्रेष्याः के च केमद्रमाख्या-
स्त चत्वारो जातभङ्गाकराः स्युः ॥ १ ॥

There are certain planetary conjunctions
which mar those leading to royal fortunes. There are
others named रेका (Reka) which produce poverty. Some
again which are called प्रेष्य (Preshya) i.c. those leading to
dependence and servitude. And lastly, there are those
called केमद्रम (Kemadruma). These four classes of yogas
abound in fortunes marred just as they were going to
rise.
मेषे जूकनवांशके दिनकरे पापेक्षिते निर्धनः
कन्याराशिगते यदा भृगुसुते कन्यांशके भिक्षुकः ।
नीचर्थे त्वतिनीचभागसहिते जातो दिवानायके
राजश्रेष्ठक्कुलाग्रजोऽपि विगतश्रीपुत्रदाराशनः ॥ २ ॥

content:
320
बसकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
Sloka 2. When the Sun occupies in Mesha a Na-
vamsa of Tula and is aspected by a malefic planet, the
person born will be money less. If Venus be in the
sign Virgo occupying a Navamsa of Virgo, a beggar is
born. When the Sun is in his depression sign occupy-
ing the extreme depression point, the person born,
though foremost in the greatest of royal families, will
soon be bereft of fortune, sons, wife and means of living.
NOTES,
This Sloka is from जातकरत्न
०१. सारावली
जूकस्य दशमे मागे स्थितः कमलबोधनः ।
सहस्रं राजयोगानां भङ्गमेव करोत्यस्यौ ।।
स्वत्रिकोणगृहं केचित्त्वोच्च याताः स्वमन्दिरम् ।
अतिनीचे रक्श्चैिको न तेषां फलसंभवः ॥
सचिवो दानवेन्द्रस्य नीचांशे समवस्थितः ।
संप्राप्तमतुलं राज्यं नरैर्हापयते ध्रुत्रम् ॥
Also जातकाभरण
तुलायां नलिनीनाथः परमं नीचमाश्रितः ।
मिर्दिष्टराजयोगानां दलनाय भवेद्धक्म् ॥
प्रसूतौ दानवामात्यः परमं नीचमाश्रितः ।
करोति पतनं नूनं मानवानां महापदात् ॥
According to Skanda, the mere position of the planets in
नीचक्षेत्र or नचिनवांश is not enough. They must also be in a certain
particular, bhava to be thus capable of marring the fortunes of
the horoscope otherwise accruing. of.
तुलायां दशमं मागमाश्रित्य यदि तिष्ठति ।
रविर्भिक्षोपजीवी स्याद्राजयोगेषु सत्स्वपि ॥
verses:
When the Sun occupies in Mesha a Na-
vamsa of Tula and is aspected by a malefic planet, the
person born will be money less. If Venus be in the
sign Virgo occupying a Navamsa of Virgo, a beggar is
born. When the Sun is in his depression sign occupy-
ing the extreme depression point, the person born,
though foremost in the greatest of royal families, will
soon be bereft of fortune, sons, wife and means of living.
जूकस्य दशमे मागे स्थितः कमलबोधनः ।
सहस्रं राजयोगानां भङ्गमेव करोत्यस्यौ ।।
स्वत्रिकोणगृहं केचित्त्वोच्च याताः स्वमन्दिरम् ।
अतिनीचे रक्श्चैिको न तेषां फलसंभवः ॥
सचिवो दानवेन्द्रस्य नीचांशे समवस्थितः ।
संप्राप्तमतुलं राज्यं नरैर्हापयते ध्रुत्रम् ॥

तुलायां नलिनीनाथः परमं नीचमाश्रितः ।
मिर्दिष्टराजयोगानां दलनाय भवेद्धक्म् ॥
प्रसूतौ दानवामात्यः परमं नीचमाश्रितः ।
करोति पतनं नूनं मानवानां महापदात् ॥

According to Skanda, the mere position of the planets in
नीचक्षेत्र or नचिनवांश is not enough. They must also be in a certain
particular, bhava to be thus capable of marring the fortunes of
the horoscope otherwise accruing. cf.
तुलायां दशमं मागमाश्रित्य यदि तिष्ठति ।
रविर्भिक्षोपजीवी स्याद्राजयोगेषु सत्स्वपि ॥

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
51. 3.
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
तृतीयं भागमाभित्य वृश्चिकेऽम्बुनि तिष्ठति
चन्द्रे याचितकं भुङ्क्ते जातोऽन्नं परवेश्मनि ॥
अष्टाविंशमधिष्ठाय भागं क्टकमे कुने ।
लग्नत्थे शाकभुक्तैत्र जातः कुक्षिमरिर्भवेत् ॥
मीने पञ्चदशं भागमाश्रित्य मदनं गते ।
केशदैः कर्मभिस्तैस्तैर्जातः सौम्ये नयेद्वपुः ॥
मकरे पञ्चमं भागनाश्रित्य धिषणे शुभम् ।
अधितिष्ठति जातो यः सोयमुंछेन जीवति ॥
कन्यायां सप्तविंशंशे भार्गवे पञ्चमं गते ।
यो जातः पुरुषः सोयं शिलवृत्यत्र जीवति ॥
अजमे विंशमाश्रित्य भागं धनगते शनौ ।
जातो यः पुरुषो नित्यं स श्ववृत्यैत्र जीवति ॥
मन्दाराहिसमन्वितेऽमरगुरौ शुक्रेन्दुपुत्रेक्षिते
जातः शुद्रकलेबरोऽपि निखिलां विद्यामुपैति श्रियम् ।
तारानाथविकर्तनौ मदगतौ सौरेण संत्रीक्षितौ
जातोऽसौ समुपैति नीचविहितोपायेन सञ्जीवितम् ॥३॥
321
Sloka 3. When Jupiter in conjunction with Sa-
turn, Mars and Rahu, is aspected by Venus and Mercury,
the person born though in body a Sudra, will acquire
every kind of knowledge and fortune. When the Sun
and the Moon occupying the 7th bhava are aspected by
Saturn, the person born will get a good living by the
adoption of means prescrived for a person of base birth.
०१. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
ध्वजाहिमन्दैः सहितेन्द्रपून्ये शुकेक्षित वा शशिसुनुहऐ ।
शुद्रोऽपि चेद्विप्र मानमेति वियां च सर्वामधिगम्य जात. ॥
verses:
तृतीयं भागमाभित्य वृश्चिकेऽम्बुनि तिष्ठति
चन्द्रे याचितकं भुङ्क्ते जातोऽन्नं परवेश्मनि ॥

मन्दाराहिसमन्वितेऽमरगुरौ शुक्रेन्दुपुत्रेक्षिते

When Jupiter in conjunction with Sa-
turn, Mars and Rahu, is aspected by Venus and Mercury,
the person born though in body a Sudra, will acquire
every kind of knowledge and fortune. When the Sun
and the Moon occupying the 7th bhava are aspected by
Saturn, the person born will get a good living by the
adoption of means prescrived for a person of base birth.
ध्वजाहिमन्दैः सहितेन्द्रपून्ये शुकेक्षित वा शशिसुनुहऐ ।
शुद्रोऽपि चेद्विप्र मानमेति वियां च सर्वामधिगम्य जात. ॥

content:
322
भातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
केन्द्रस्थे वा विलग्ने दिनकरतनये सौम्यखेटैरदृष्टे
भूसुनोः कालहोरासमयजमनुजो भिक्षुको दासभूतः ।
सौम्यादृष्टेऽर्कदृष्टे शशिनि सरुधिरे मेषगे भिक्षुकः स्याद्
आर्कीन्द्वकैः सकेन्द्रैर्जडतनुरधनश्चान्यभुक्ताशनः स्यात् ॥४॥
Sloka 4. When Saturn occupies either a Kendra
position or the rising sign and is unaspected by benefic
planets, a person born in the काळहोरा (Kalahora) [vide
श्रीपतिपद्धतिः (Sripati Paddhati), Adhyaya 3, Sloka 14, Notes]
of Mars becomes a slave and a beggar. When the
Moon in conjunction with Mars occupies Mesha and is
aspected not by benefic planets but by the Sun, the
person born is a mendicant. If Saturn, the Moon and
the Sun be in Kendra positions, the person born will be
dull in appearance, indigent and feeding upon the
leavings of other people.
०१. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
तत्कालहोराधिपतौ धरराजे केन्द्रे शनों चेद्यदि वा विलग्ने ।
शुभग्रहाणामवलोकहीने दासस्तु भिक्षाशनदेहशीलः ॥
केन्द्रस्थिता मन्दनिशाकरार्का जडो भवेदन्यत्रसूपभोक्ता ॥
मन्दे केन्द्रगते विलग्नगृहगे चन्द्रेऽन्त्यभे वाक्पतौ
जातो भिक्षुक एव शोकजलधौ मग्नो विदेशं गतः ।
धर्मस्थानपतो तु रिःफगृहगे पापग्रहे केन्द्रगे
जातः पापरतः परान्नधनभुक् विद्याविहीनो भवेत् ॥५॥
Sloka 5. When Saturn is in a Kendra position,
the Moon in the rising sign and Jupiter in the 12th
bhava, the person born will be none other than a beggar
forlorn and in exile. When the lord of the 9th bhava
occupies the 12th and a malefic planet is in a Kendra
position, the person born will be addicted to evil, eating

the Moon in the rising sign and Jupiter in the 12th

title: षष्टोऽध्यायः
content:
S1.6-7
षष्टोऽध्यायः
323
at other people's table and maintained by their money
and illiterate.
सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
केन्द्रे रानौ लग्नगते शशाङ्के जीवे व्यये भिक्षुक एव जातः ।
जीवे राहुयुतेऽथवा शिखिपुते पापेक्षिते नीचकृत्
नीचे नीचसमीक्षिते सुरगुरौ विप्रोऽपि दुष्कर्मकृत् ।
निद्री चन्द्रविलग्नपौ सह दिवानाथेन मन्देक्षितौ
प्रेष्यः स्यादशुभैः शुभग्रहदृशा हीनैश्च मानस्थितैः ॥ ६ ॥
Sloka 6. When Jupiter in conjunction with Rahu
or Ketu is aspected by malefic planets, the person born
will do base acts. When Jupiter in his depression is
aspected by a planet which is also in his depression
sign, even a person that is born a Brahmin will commit
wicked crimes. If the Moon and the lord of the rising
sign be in conjunction with the Sun and aspected by
Saturn, the person born will be slothful. If malefic
planets occupy the 10th bhava and be without benefic
aspect, the person born will be a menial.
सर्वार्थचितामणि
NOTES.
जीवे सकेतौ यदि वा सराहौ चण्डालता पापनिरीक्षिते देत् ।
नीचांशगे नीचममन्त्रिते वा जीत्र द्विजश्चदपि तादृशः स्यात् ॥
The latter half of this sloka reads thus in नातकरल
नीचौ चन्द्रविलग्नौ सहदिवानाथेन मन्देक्षितौ
प्रेष्यः स्याच्छुभखेचरेण मिलितौ प्रेष्येण संजीवितः ॥
भाग्येशेऽन्त्यगत सहोदरगतैः पापैव्ययेशेऽथेगे
दुर्भोजी परिबन्धनादिसहितो जातोऽन्यजायारतः ।
verses:
केन्द्रे रानौ लग्नगते शशाङ्के जीवे व्यये भिक्षुक एव जातः ।
जीवे राहुयुतेऽथवा शिखिपुते पापेक्षिते नीचकृत्
नीचे नीचसमीक्षिते सुरगुरौ विप्रोऽपि दुष्कर्मकृत् ।
निद्री चन्द्रविलग्नपौ सह दिवानाथेन मन्देक्षितौ
प्रेष्यः स्यादशुभैः शुभग्रहदृशा हीनैश्च मानस्थितैः ॥

When Jupiter in conjunction with Rahu
or Ketu is aspected by malefic planets, the person born
will do base acts. When Jupiter in his depression is
aspected by a planet which is also in his depression
sign, even a person that is born a Brahmin will commit
wicked crimes. If the Moon and the lord of the rising
sign be in conjunction with the Sun and aspected by
Saturn, the person born will be slothful. If malefic
planets occupy the 10th bhava and be without benefic
aspect, the person born will be a menial.
जीवे सकेतौ यदि वा सराहौ चण्डालता पापनिरीक्षिते देत् ।
नीचांशगे नीचममन्त्रिते वा जीत्र द्विजश्चदपि तादृशः स्यात् ॥

नीचौ चन्द्रविलग्नौ सहदिवानाथेन मन्देक्षितौ
प्रेष्यः स्याच्छुभखेचरेण मिलितौ प्रेष्येण संजीवितः ॥

भाग्येशेऽन्त्यगत सहोदरगतैः पापैव्ययेशेऽथेगे
दुर्भोजी परिबन्धनादिसहितो जातोऽन्यजायारतः ।

content:
324
आतकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
सर्वैर्नीचसपत्नभागसहितैः कर्मेतरस्थानगै-
बिंद्याबुद्धिकलत्रपुत्ररहितः कोपी सदा भैक्षाकृत् ॥ ७ ॥
Sloka 7. When the lord of the 9th bhava is in
the 12th and malefic planets occupy the 3rd bhava, and
the lord of the 12th bhava occupies the 2nd, the person
born will eat unwholesome food, wear a truss or other
band and be an adulterer. When all the planets, being
in bhavas other than the 10th, occupy their depression
or inimical signs or portions of them, the person born
will be lacking in learning, intelligence, wife and child-
ren, will be ill-tempered and go about begging.
cf. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
भाग्येश्वरे रिःफगते तदीशे वित्तस्थिते भ्रातृगतैश्च पापैः ।
केमद्रुमेऽस्मिन् स भवेत्नुभोजी दुष्कर्मयुक्तोऽन्यकलत्रगामी ।।
सर्वग्रहेर्नीत्रसपत्लभौगः कर्मान्यगैर्भिक्षुक एव जातः ।।
लग्रस्वामिनि रिःफगे तु वियति क्ररे सचन्द्रे कुजे
जातोऽसौ परदेशगः सुखधनत्यागी दरिद्रो भवेत् ।
होराजन्मपती न शोभनश्रुतौ वास्तङ्गतावन्त्यगे
भाग्यशे यदि नष्टदारतनयो जातः कुलध्वंसकः ॥ ८ ॥
Sloka 8. When the lord of the rising sign occu-
pies the 12th bhava and Mars in conjunction with the
Moon is in a malefic sign identical with the 10th bhava,
the person born will have to go to a foreign land where
he may have to live in indigence sacrificing comforts and
affluence. If when the lord of the 9th bhava is in the
12th, the lords of the rising sign and of that occupied
by the Moon are not in conjunction with benefic pla-
nets or are eclipsed by the Sun, the person born losing
his wife and children will bring his family to extinction.
verses:
सर्वैर्नीचसपत्नभागसहितैः कर्मेतरस्थानगै-
बिंद्याबुद्धिकलत्रपुत्ररहितः कोपी सदा भैक्षाकृत् ॥ ७ ॥

ren, will be ill-tempered and go about begging.

भाग्यशे यदि नष्टदारतनयो जातः कुलध्वंसकः ॥ ८ ॥

लग्रस्वामिनि रिःफगे तु वियति क्ररे सचन्द्रे कुजे
जातोऽसौ परदेशगः सुखधनत्यागी दरिद्रो भवेत् ।

भाग्यशे यदि नष्टदारतनयो जातः कुलध्वंसकः ॥ ८ ॥

When the lord of the rising sign occu-
pies the 12th bhava and Mars in conjunction with the
Moon is in a malefic sign identical with the 10th bhava,

he may have to live in indigence sacrificing comforts and

nets or are eclipsed by the Sun, the person born losing
his wife and children will bring his family to extinction.

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 9.
f. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
NOTES
होरेश्वरे रिःफगते तु माने क्रूरान्त्रिते भौमयुते शशा के ।
जातोऽभिशस्तः परदेशवासी मिक्षाशनी दुःखितदहभ'क् स्यात् ॥
भाग्येश्वरे चान्त्यगते सपापें जन्मोदयेशौ रत्रिगौ कुलप्नः ।
त्रिनष्टपुत्रार्थकलत्रभाक् स्यात् शुमैनेयुक्तौ यदि वीक्षितौ वा ॥
325
By the the term कर (Krura) as applied to a house in the first
पाद (pada) of the sloka, all the five houses of malefics, viz., Mesha,
Simba, Vrischika, Makara and Kumbha are not meant, but only
Meshä, Simha and Kumbha. Here the difference between the
terms पापक्ष (Paparksha) and करी (Krurarksha) may be noted.
The one means "all the houses owned by malefics," while the
other confines them to "their odd signs."
L
सौम्यासौम्ययुतेषु केन्द्रभवनेष्विन्दौ तनुस्खामिना
दृष्टे मन्दनवांशके सति कुलध्वंसी विदारात्मजः ।
कामे बोधनशुक्रयोः सुतगृहे जीवे सुखस्थेऽशुभे
पापे रन्ध्रगते च चन्द्रभवनाञ्जाताः कुलध्वंसिनः ॥ ९ ॥
Sloka 9. When benefic and malefic planets occupy
Kendra positions, and the Moon aspected by the lord of
the rising sign is in a Navamsa belonging to Saturn, the
person born brings his race to an end becoming bereft
of wife and children. When Mercury and Venus
occupy the 7th bhava, Jupiter the 5th, a malefic planet
the 4th and another malefic planet the 8th, all the bhavas
in this case being calculated from the Moon's place,
under such a yoga are born those with whom their race
dies.
०१. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
शुभाशुभैः केन्द्रगतैः शशाङ्कको लग्नेश्वरेणापि निरीक्षितश्चेत ।
सौरांशके वा यदि संयुतश्चज्जातः कुलध्वंसकरो विदारः ॥
verses:
होरेश्वरे रिःफगते तु माने क्रूरान्त्रिते भौमयुते शशा के ।
जातोऽभिशस्तः परदेशवासी मिक्षाशनी दुःखितदहभ'क् स्यात् ॥
भाग्येश्वरे चान्त्यगते सपापें जन्मोदयेशौ रत्रिगौ कुलप्नः ।

The one means "all the houses owned by malefics," while the
other confines them to "their odd signs."

पापे रन्ध्रगते च चन्द्रभवनाञ्जाताः कुलध्वंसिनः ॥

Kendra positions, and the Moon aspected by the lord of
the rising sign is in a Navamsa belonging to Saturn, the

of wife and children. When Mercury and Venus
occupy the 7th bhava, Jupiter the 5th, a malefic planet
the 4th and another malefic planet the 8th, all the bhavas
in this case being calculated from the Moon's place,
under such a yoga are born those with whom their race
dies.

सौरांशके वा यदि संयुतश्चज्जातः कुलध्वंसकरो विदारः ॥

content:
326
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
चरावसाने शशिनि स्थिरादौ द्विदेहमध्ये बलवर्जिते च ।
हीने विलग्ने यदि खेचरेन्द्रैर्विनाशमेति क्षितिपालयोगः ॥ १० ॥
Sloka 10. When the Moon is at the close of a
moveable sign, or in the beginning of a fixed one, or in
the middle of a dual Rasi and is without strength, and
when the rising sign is unoccupied by planets, Rajayoga
comes to an end.
cf. सारावली
अन्त्याष्टमादिभागे चरराश्यादिषु शशी यदा क्षोणः ।
एकेनापि न दृष्टो ग्रहेण भङ्गस्तदा नृपतेः ।
लग्नराशिनत्रभागनायका भानुशीतकरदेवपूजिताः ।
शत्रुभागसहिताः खनचिभवामिभांशसहिताः परानुगः ॥ ११ ॥
Sloka 11. If, at a birth, the planet owning the
rising Navamsa be the Sun, the Moon or Jupiter; and if
it should occupy in its depression sign a Navamsa owned
by its enemy and the lord of its depression sign, the
person born will be the follower or servant of another.
शशिनि गगनयाते कामगे दानवेज्ये
नवमभवनयाते पापखेटे कुलघ्नः ।
भूगुजशशिजचन्द्राः केन्द्रगा जन्मलग्ने
तमसि विहितकर्मध्वंसको नीचतुल्यः ॥ १२ ॥
Sloka 12. When the Moon is in the 10th bhava,
Jupiter in the 7th and a malefic planet in the 9th, the
person born becomes the ruiner of his family. If Venus,
Mercury and the Moon occupy Kendra positions and
Rahu be in the rising sign, the person born will live
like a base-born wretch, lost to all sense of duty enjoin-
ed in the sacred scriptures.
verses:
चरावसाने शशिनि स्थिरादौ द्विदेहमध्ये बलवर्जिते च ।
हीने विलग्ने यदि खेचरेन्द्रैर्विनाशमेति क्षितिपालयोगः ॥ १० ॥

When the Moon is at the close of a
moveable sign, or in the beginning of a fixed one, or in
the middle of a dual Rasi and is without strength, and
when the rising sign is unoccupied by planets, Rajayoga
comes to an end.
अन्त्याष्टमादिभागे चरराश्यादिषु शशी यदा क्षोणः ।
एकेनापि न दृष्टो ग्रहेण भङ्गस्तदा नृपतेः ।

लग्नराशिनत्रभागनायका भानुशीतकरदेवपूजिताः ।
शत्रुभागसहिताः खनचिभवामिभांशसहिताः परानुगः ॥ ११ ॥

If, at a birth, the planet owning the
rising Navamsa be the Sun, the Moon or Jupiter; and if
it should occupy in its depression sign a Navamsa owned
by its enemy and the lord of its depression sign, the
person born will be the follower or servant of another.
शशिनि गगनयाते कामगे दानवेज्ये
नवमभवनयाते पापखेटे कुलघ्नः ।
भूगुजशशिजचन्द्राः केन्द्रगा जन्मलग्ने
तमसि विहितकर्मध्वंसको नीचतुल्यः ॥ १२ ॥

When the Moon is in the 10th bhava,
Jupiter in the 7th and a malefic planet in the 9th, the
person born becomes the ruiner of his family. If Venus,
Mercury and the Moon occupy Kendra positions and
Rahu be in the rising sign, the person born will live
like a base-born wretch, lost to all sense of duty enjoin-
ed in the sacred scriptures.

title: षष्ठाऽध्यायः
content:
$1. 13-15
षष्ठाऽध्यायः
NOTES.
(First half). Vide also Adhyaya XIII, sloka 20, infra.
(Latter half). of सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
समन्विताः सौम्यशशाङ्कशुका केन्द्रस्थिता भोगिनि चेद्विलग्ने ।
चण्डालयोगः स भवेत्तदानीं जातो निजाचारसुकर्महीनः ॥
Also जातकादेश
शशिबुधशुकाः केन्द्रे संयुक्ता राहुसंयुते लग्ने ।
चण्डालयोगमस्मिन् जातो निजवंशकर्मरहितः स्यात् ॥
327
नीचे भृगौ मन्दनवांशके वा दुःस्थानगे भानुसुतेक्षिते च ।
कामस्थिते शीतकरे सभानौ मात्रा सह प्रैष्यमुपैति नित्यम् ॥ १३ ॥
Sluka 13. When Venus in its depression sign or
in a Navamsa owned by Saturn occupies a दुःस्थान (Dus-
stthana (such as the 6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava) and
is aspected by Saturn; and when the Moon in conjun-
ction with the Sun occupies the 7th bhava, the person
born will be in perpetual servitude with his mother.
नीचे गुरौ वासरनायके वा केन्द्रस्थिते पापयुते शिशुप्तः ।
केन्द्रे सपापे शुभदृष्टिहीने रन्ध्र गुरौ गोमृगजातिहन्ता ॥ १४ ॥
Sloka 14. When Jupiter in its depression or the
Sun in the same position occupies a केन्द्र (Kendra) in con-
junction with a malefic planet the person born will
commit infanticide. When a malefic planet is in a केन्द्र
(Kendra) and has no benefic aspect, and Jupiter occupies
the Sth bhava, the person born will be the slaughterer of
animals of the cow and deer kinds -i.e. will become the
purveyor of beef and venison.
शशाङ्कसौम्यौ दशमोपयातौ पापेक्षितौ पापसमन्वितौ च ।
नीचांशगौ सौम्यदृशा विहीनौ जानस्तु नित्यं खलु पक्षिहन्ता ॥ १५॥
verses:
समन्विताः सौम्यशशाङ्कशुका केन्द्रस्थिता भोगिनि चेद्विलग्ने । चण्डालयोगः स भवेत्तदानीं जातो निजाचारसुकर्महीनः ॥

शशिबुधशुकाः केन्द्रे संयुक्ता राहुसंयुते लग्ने । चण्डालयोगमस्मिन् जातो निजवंशकर्मरहितः स्यात् ॥

नीचे भृगौ मन्दनवांशके वा दुःस्थानगे भानुसुतेक्षिते च । कामस्थिते शीतकरे सभानौ मात्रा सह प्रैष्यमुपैति नित्यम् ॥ १३ ॥

When Venus in its depression sign or in a Navamsa owned by Saturn occupies a दुःस्थान (Dus-stthana (such as the 6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava) and is aspected by Saturn; and when the Moon in conjunction with the Sun occupies the 7th bhava, the person born will be in perpetual servitude with his mother.
नीचे गुरौ वासरनायके वा केन्द्रस्थिते पापयुते शिशुप्तः । केन्द्रे सपापे शुभदृष्टिहीने रन्ध्र गुरौ गोमृगजातिहन्ता ॥ १४ ॥

When Jupiter in its depression or the Sun in the same position occupies a केन्द्र (Kendra) in conjunction with a malefic planet the person born will commit infanticide. When a malefic planet is in a केन्द्र (Kendra) and has no benefic aspect, and Jupiter occupies the 8th bhava, the person born will be the slaughterer of animals of the cow and deer kinds —i.e. will become the purveyor of beef and venison.
शशाङ्कसौम्यौ दशमोपयातौ पापेक्षितौ पापसमन्वितौ च । नीचांशगौ सौम्यदृशा विहीनौ जानस्तु नित्यं खलु पक्षिहन्ता ॥ १५॥

title: जातकपारिआते
content:
328
जातकपारिआते
Adh. VI.
Sloka 15. When the Moon and Morcury in con-
junction with a malefic planet are in the 10th bhava
and are aspected likewise by a malefic planet and when
the Navamsas they occupy belong to their depression
signs and have no benefic aspect on them, the person
born will be a fowler all his life.
NOTES.
This sloka apears also in जातकरल.
चन्द्रात्सुते लग्नपतौ धने वा सौम्येतरेष्वष्टमराशिगेषु ।
मानस्थितेऽशीतकरे तदानीं जातस्तु जीवत्यतिहेयवृत्त्या ॥ १६ ॥
Sloka 16. If the lord of the rising sign occupy the
5th or the 2nd bhava from the Moon and malefic planets
be in the 8th and the Sun in the 10th, the person born
will live by a profession very far from enviable.
नीचारिभांशौ भृगुदेवपूज्यौ तदंशके वासरनाथपुत्रे ।
जातः सदुःखः सुतदारहीनः कृच्छ्रेण संजीवति भाग्यहीनः ॥१७॥
Sloka 17. If the Navamsas occupied by Venus
and Jupiter be owned by their several depression or
inimical signs and if Saturn also be in a Navamsa such
as described above, the person born will suffer afflic
tions and live in pain and unhappiness bereft of wife
and children.
NOTES.
Slokas 13-17 are also quoted in सर्वार्थचिंतामणि.
सर्वे पापाः केन्द्रनीचारिसंस्था सौम्यैर्दृष्टा रिःफरन्ध्रारियातैः ।
निघ्नन्त्येते राजयोगं ग्रहेन्द्राः नीचारातिक्रूरषष्ठयंशकाश्च ॥ १८ ॥
Sloku 18. If all the malefic planets be in Kendra
positions identical with their depression or inimical
signs, and if they be at the same time aspected by
verses:
When the Moon and Morcury in con-
junction with a malefic planet are in the 10th bhava
and are aspected likewise by a malefic planet and when
the Navamsas they occupy belong to their depression
signs and have no benefic aspect on them, the person
born will be a fowler all his life.

चन्द्रात्सुते लग्नपतौ धने वा सौम्येतरेष्वष्टमराशिगेषु ।
मानस्थितेऽशीतकरे तदानीं जातस्तु जीवत्यतिहेयवृत्त्या ॥

If the lord of the rising sign occupy the
5th or the 2nd bhava from the Moon and malefic planets
be in the 8th and the Sun in the 10th, the person born
will live by a profession very far from enviable.

नीचारिभांशौ भृगुदेवपूज्यौ तदंशके वासरनाथपुत्रे ।
जातः सदुःखः सुतदारहीनः कृच्छ्रेण संजीवति भाग्यहीनः ॥

If the Navamsas occupied by Venus
and Jupiter be owned by their several depression or
inimical signs and if Saturn also be in a Navamsa such
as described above, the person born will suffer afflic
tions and live in pain and unhappiness bereft of wife
and children.

सर्वे पापाः केन्द्रनीचारिसंस्था सौम्यैर्दृष्टा रिःफरन्ध्रारियातैः ।
निघ्नन्त्येते राजयोगं ग्रहेन्द्राः नीचारातिक्रूरषष्ठयंशकाश्च ॥

If all the malefic planets be in Kendra
positions identical with their depression or inimical
signs, and if they be at the same time aspected by

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 18.
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
329
benefic planets occupying the 12th, the 8th and the 6th
bhavas, they destroy the Rajayoga of the horoscope no
less than those planets which occupy malefic 60th
portions in their depression and inimical signs.
NOTES.
It is not possible to give an example for the yoga described in
the text, viz, malefics in Kendras being at the same time aspected
by benefics in Dusstthanas (6th, 8th or 12th). If the first half of
the sloka be interpreted as "if all malefic planets be placed in
Kendra, depression or inintical positions and be at the same time
aspected by benefics occupying the 6th, 8th or 12th bhavas," the
following horoscope may be suggested as an example:

content:
350
बालकपारिआत्त
Adh. VI.
malefics should be in Kendra positions identical with their depres-
sion or inimical signs and (2) that all benefics should be posited in
Dusstthanas (6th, 8th or 12th) hold good, it is stated there that the
malefics should not be associated with or aspeciel by the benefics.
cf. सारवली
सर्वे कुराः केन्द्रे नीचारिगता न सौम्ययुतदृष्टाः ।
शुभदा व्ययरिपुरन्धे तदाऽपि भङ्गो भवेन्नृपतेः ॥
केन्द्रस्थिता मन्दनिशाकरार्काः शुभैरदृष्टा यदि मद्यपायी ।
क्ररारिषष्ठयंशकनीचभागा दुष्कर्मयुक्तोऽन्यकलत्रगामी ॥ १९ ॥
A
Sloka 19. If Saturn, the Moon and the Sun occupy
Kendra positions and are not aspected by benefic planets,
the person born will be a drunkard. If the same planets
occupy malefic 60th portions owned by their inimical
and depression signs, the person concerned will be
wickedly inclined and commit adultery with another's
wife.
NOTES.
First half.-Vide also sloka 81 infre.
Latter half. For the same effect, the following yoga is also
mentioned int जातकरल
क्षीणे शशाङ्के यदि पापयुक्त दारस्थितेत्वन्य कलत्रगामी ॥
नीचे भृगौ धर्मगते सपापे द्विजप्रहर्ता यदि पापदृष्टे ।
व्यये शुभक्षेऽर्कसुतांशकस्ये भृगौ च दासीपरनन्दनः स्यात् ॥ २०॥
Sloka 20. If Venus in its depression sign and in
conjunction with a malefic planet occupy the 9th bhava
and be aspected by a malefic planet, the person born
will be a fowler. If a benefic sign represent the 12th
bhava and Venus occupy therein a Navamsa owned by
Saturn, the person born will be excessively addicted to
Servant maids.
verses:
सर्वे कुराः केन्द्रे नीचारिगता न सौम्ययुतदृष्टाः ।
शुभदा व्ययरिपुरन्धे तदाऽपि भङ्गो भवेन्नृपतेः ॥

केन्द्रस्थिता मन्दनिशाकरार्काः शुभैरदृष्टा यदि मद्यपायी ।
क्ररारिषष्ठयंशकनीचभागा दुष्कर्मयुक्तोऽन्यकलत्रगामी ॥ १९ ॥

If Saturn, the Moon and the Sun occupy
Kendra positions and are not aspected by benefic planets,
the person born will be a drunkard. If the same planets
occupy malefic 60th portions owned by their inimical
and depression signs, the person concerned will be
wickedly inclined and commit adultery with another's
wife.
क्षीणे शशाङ्के यदि पापयुक्त दारस्थितेत्वन्य कलत्रगामी ॥

नीचे भृगौ धर्मगते सपापे द्विजप्रहर्ता यदि पापदृष्टे ।
व्यये शुभक्षेऽर्कसुतांशकस्ये भृगौ च दासीपरनन्दनः स्यात् ॥ २० ॥

If Venus in its depression sign and in
conjunction with a malefic planet occupy the 9th bhava
and be aspected by a malefic planet, the person born
will be a fowler. If a benefic sign represent the 12th
bhava and Venus occupy therein a Navamsa owned by
Saturn, the person born will be excessively addicted to
Servant maids.

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 21-22
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
NOTES.
331
The second half of this slokt is quite different in थिवितामणि, खंड.
विवर्णतामेति फणीन्द्रयुक्त माने तदा भौषयुते शिशुघ्नः ॥
॥ रेकायोगाः ॥
लग्नेशे बलवर्जिते परिभवस्थानाधिपेनेक्षिते
सूयोंच्छिन्नकरे पुरन्दरगुरौ रेकाख्ययोगो भवेत् ।
बन्धुस्थानपसंयुतांशकपतौ तिग्मांशुलुप्तयतौ
रिःफेशेन निरीक्षिते सति यदा योगस्तु रेकाह्वयः ॥ २१ ॥
Sloka 21. If at a birth the lord of the rising sign
has no strength and is aspected by the lord of the 8th
bhava and if Jupiter is obscured by the Sun, there will
be the planetary conjunction called रेका Reka) (emptying
or purging). If the lord of the Navamsa occupied by
the lord of the 4th bhava be obscured by the Sun while
being aspected by the lord of the 12th bhava there will
again be the yoga termed रेका (Reka).
षष्ठस्वामिनिरीक्षिते सुखपतौ रन्ध्रशयुक्ते तथा
मानेशे सुतगे विलग्नरमणे नीचङ्गते रेकभाक् ।
रन्ध्रारिव्ययराशिगा यदि शुभाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपगाः
पापा लाभगृहाधिपे च विबले रेकाभिशस्तो भवेत् ॥२२॥
Sloka 22. When the lord of the 4th bhava is
aspected by the lord of the 6th; when the lord of the
9th in conjunction with the lord of the 8th occupies
the 5th bhava and when the lord of the rising sign is
depressed, the person born gets रेका (Reka) for his lot.
When benefic planets are in the 8th, the 6th and the
12th bhavas, while malefic ones occupy Kendra and
verses:
विवर्णतामेति फणीन्द्रयुक्त माने तदा भौषयुते शिशुघ्नः ॥

लग्नेशे बलवर्जिते परिभवस्थानाधिपेनेक्षिते
सूयोंच्छिन्नकरे पुरन्दरगुरौ रेकाख्ययोगो भवेत् ।
बन्धुस्थानपसंयुतांशकपतौ तिग्मांशुलुप्तयतौ
रिःफेशेन निरीक्षिते सति यदा योगस्तु रेकाह्वयः ॥ २१ ॥

If at a birth the lord of the rising sign
has no strength and is aspected by the lord of the 8th
bhava and if Jupiter is obscured by the Sun, there will
be the planetary conjunction called रेका Reka) (emptying
or purging). If the lord of the Navamsa occupied by
the lord of the 4th bhava be obscured by the Sun while
being aspected by the lord of the 12th bhava there will
again be the yoga termed रेका (Reka).
षष्ठस्वामिनिरीक्षिते सुखपतौ रन्ध्रशयुक्ते तथा
मानेशे सुतगे विलग्नरमणे नीचङ्गते रेकभाक् ।
रन्ध्रारिव्ययराशिगा यदि शुभाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपगाः
पापा लाभगृहाधिपे च विबले रेकाभिशस्तो भवेत् ॥२२॥

When the lord of the 4th bhava is
aspected by the lord of the 6th; when the lord of the
9th in conjunction with the lord of the 8th occupies
the 5th bhava and when the lord of the rising sign is
depressed, the person born gets रेका (Reka) for his lot.
When benefic planets are in the 8th, the 6th and the
12th bhavas, while malefic ones occupy Kendra and

title: Adh. VI.
content:
332
बातकपारिआते
Adh. VI.
Trikona positions and when the lord of the 11th bhava
is without strength, the person concerned suffers inju-
rious effects of the रेकायोग (Rekayoga).
होरेशः खलसंयुतः सितगुरू चास्तंगतौ तद्वदेद्
बन्धुख्यानपतिः शुभेतरयुतश्चास्तं गतो रेकदः ।
भाग्यस्थानपतौ विकर्तनकरच्छन्ने विलग्नाधिपे
नीचसेो धनपे च नीचगृहगे रेकाभिधानो भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥
Sloka 23. If the lord of the rising sign be in
conjunction with a malefic planet; if Venus and Jupiter
have become invisible; and if the planet owning the 4th
bhava being in conjunction with a malefic one disappear
likewise, a रेकायोग (Reka yoga) is produced. When the
lord of the 9th bhava is obscured by the Sun's rays and
when the lords of the rising sign and the 2nd bhava
occupy their depression signs, there is the रेकायोग (Reka
yoga) again.
नीचस्थानगता दिनेशकिरणच्छन्नास्त्रयो लग्नपे
दुष्टस्थानगतेऽथवा गतबले योगस्तु रेकप्रदः ।
होरावित्तनवास्पदायसुखधीकामानुजस्था खला-
स्तस्यायुर्नवभागरेकफलदा नीचारिपापेक्षिताः ॥ २४ ॥
Sloka 24. A रेकायोग (Rekayoga) is produced when
there are three planets either depressed in position or
obscured by the Sun's rays, and when the lord of the
rising sign occupies a bad position (such as the 6th, the
8th and the 12th bhava) or is without strength. If
malefic planets-aspected by depressed, inimical, or
malefic planets-occupy any of the 9 bhavas, namely
the 1st, the 2nd, the 9th, the 10th, the 11th, the 4th, the
5th, the 7th and the 3rd; they will produce the Reka
effect in respect to the bhavas affected.
verses:
होरेशः खलसंयुतः सितगुरू चास्तंगतौ तद्वदेद्
बन्धुख्यानपतिः शुभेतरयुतश्चास्तं गतो रेकदः ।
भाग्यस्थानपतौ विकर्तनकरच्छन्ने विलग्नाधिपे
नीचसेो धनपे च नीचगृहगे रेकाभिधानो भवेत् ॥ २३ ॥

If the lord of the rising sign be in
conjunction with a malefic planet; if Venus and Jupiter
have become invisible; and if the planet owning the 4th
bhava being in conjunction with a malefic one disappear
likewise, a रेकायोग (Reka yoga) is produced. When the
lord of the 9th bhava is obscured by the Sun's rays and
when the lords of the rising sign and the 2nd bhava
occupy their depression signs, there is the रेकायोग (Reka
yoga) again.

नीचस्थानगता दिनेशकिरणच्छन्नास्त्रयो लग्नपे
दुष्टस्थानगतेऽथवा गतबले योगस्तु रेकप्रदः ।
होरावित्तनवास्पदायसुखधीकामानुजस्था खला-
स्तस्यायुर्नवभागरेकफलदा नीचारिपापेक्षिताः ॥ २४ ॥

A रेकायोग (Rekayoga) is produced when
there are three planets either depressed in position or
obscured by the Sun's rays, and when the lord of the
rising sign occupies a bad position (such as the 6th, the
8th and the 12th bhava) or is without strength. If
malefic planets-aspected by depressed, inimical, or
malefic planets-occupy any of the 9 bhavas, namely
the 1st, the 2nd, the 9th, the 10th, the 11th, the 4th, the
5th, the 7th and the 3rd; they will produce the Reka
effect in respect to the bhavas affected.

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
'IS 25-27
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
333
एकद्विकत्रिकखलद्युचरा नराणां
कल्पस्वविक्रमगताः परतस्तथैव ।
आदौ तु मध्यवयसि क्रमशस्तदन्त्ये
रेकप्रदा रिपुखलग्रहनीचदृष्टाः ॥ २५ ॥
Sloka 25. A single malefic planet, a pair of male-
fic planets or a triad of them occupying any one of the
nine bhavas (mentioned in the latter half of the preced-
ing sloka) and aspected by depressed, inimical, malefic
planets, will produce the effect of the Rekayoga respec-
tively in the early, the middle or the concluding portion
of the lives of the person concerned.
॥ रेकाफलम् ॥
निर्विद्यो विधनो दरिद्रदहितो रेकोद्भवः कामुकः
क्रोधी दुःखितमानसो रुचिकरः सौभाग्यहीनः पटुः ।
भिक्षाशी मलिनो विवादनिरतो मात्सर्यरोषान्वितो
देवब्राह्मणदूषकः प्रतिदिनं दारात्मजैर्निन्दितः ॥ २६ ॥
Sloka 25. A person born under the Reka yoga has
neither knowledge nor wealth; he is penurious, hostile,
lustful and wrathful; his mind is always distressed; he
is disagreeable, having no beauty or grace; he is crafty;
he lives on alms; he is filthy and quarrelsome; he is
full of envy and rage; he reviles gods and Brahmanas
and he is rated daily by his (wife and sons) whole
family.
दुष्टात्मा कुनखी कुमार्गनिरतो दौर्भाग्ययोगान्वितो
बन्धूनामषकारक्षण पर स्वल्पायुराभिक्षुकः ।
verses:
निर्विद्यो विधनो दरिद्रदहितो रेकोद्भवः कामुकः
क्रोधी दुःखितमानसो रुचिकरः सौभाग्यहीनः पटुः ।
भिक्षाशी मलिनो विवादनिरतो मात्सर्यरोषान्वितो
देवब्राह्मणदूषकः प्रतिदिनं दारात्मजैर्निन्दितः ॥

A person born under the Reka yoga has
neither knowledge nor wealth; he is penurious, hostile,
lustful and wrathful; his mind is always distressed; he
is disagreeable, having no beauty or grace; he is crafty;
he lives on alms; he is filthy and quarrelsome; he is
full of envy and rage; he reviles gods and Brahmanas
and he is rated daily by his (wife and sons) whole
family.

दुष्टात्मा कुनखी कुमार्गनिरतो दौर्भाग्ययोगान्वितो
बन्धूनामषकारक्षण पर स्वल्पायुराभिक्षुकः ।

content:
334
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI
मूकोऽन्धो बधिरः प्रमत्तहृदयः कामातुरो रोषवान्
पङ्गुर्नेत्रविकारभावसहितो रेकोद्भवः स्यान्नरः ॥ २७ ॥
Sloka. 27. A person born under the Reka yoga
will be evil-minded; he will have ugly or diseased
nails; he will be given to bad ways; he will be ill off;
he will be intent on injuring and abusing his relatives;
he may be short-lived; he may beg all round; he may be
a mute; he may be blind, deaf or insane in mind; he
may be lustful or wrathful; he may be a cripple; his
thoughts may be betrayed by the change in his eyes.
॥ दरिद्र्योगाः ॥
भाग्येश्वरादतिबली निधनेश्वरो वा
लग्नाधिपस्त्रिदशनाथगुरुर्यदि स्यात् ।
केन्द्राद्धहिर्दिनकरस्य कराभितप्तो
लाभाधिपो यदि विहीनबलो दरिद्रः ॥ २८ ॥
Sloka 28. When Jupiter, being the lord of the
8th or the 1st bhava, exceeds the lord of the 9th bhava
in strength, and when the lord of the 11th occupying a
position other than a Kendra is scorched by the Sun's
rays and is weak in strength, the person born will be
indigent.
लाभारिव्ययरन्ध्रपुत्रगृहगा जीवारमन्देन्दुजा
नीचस्थानगता यदा रविकरच्छन्नास्तदा भिक्षुकः ।
भाग्यस्थानगतो दिनेशतनयः सौम्येतरैरीक्षितो
लग्नस्थः शशिनन्दनो रवियुतो नीचांशगो भिक्षुकः ॥२९॥
Sloka 29 If Jupiter, Mars, Saturn or Mercury,
being depressed and obscured by the Sun's rays, occupy
the 11th, the 6th, the 12th, the 8th or the 5th bhava at
verses:
मूकोऽन्धो बधिरः प्रमत्तहृदयः कामातुरो रोषवान्
पङ्गुर्नेत्रविकारभावसहितो रेकोद्भवः स्यान्नरः ॥

A person born under the Reka yoga
will be evil-minded; he will have ugly or diseased
nails; he will be given to bad ways; he will be ill off;
he will be intent on injuring and abusing his relatives;
he may be short-lived; he may beg all round; he may be
a mute; he may be blind, deaf or insane in mind; he
may be lustful or wrathful; he may be a cripple; his
thoughts may be betrayed by the change in his eyes.

भाग्येश्वरादतिबली निधनेश्वरो वा
लग्नाधिपस्त्रिदशनाथगुरुर्यदि स्यात् ।
केन्द्राद्धहिर्दिनकरस्य कराभितप्तो
लाभाधिपो यदि विहीनबलो दरिद्रः ॥

When Jupiter, being the lord of the
8th or the 1st bhava, exceeds the lord of the 9th bhava
in strength, and when the lord of the 11th occupying a
position other than a Kendra is scorched by the Sun's
rays and is weak in strength, the person born will be
indigent.

लाभारिव्ययरन्ध्रपुत्रगृहगा जीवारमन्देन्दुजा
नीचस्थानगता यदा रविकरच्छन्नास्तदा भिक्षुकः ।
भाग्यस्थानगतो दिनेशतनयः सौम्येतरैरीक्षितो
लग्नस्थः शशिनन्दनो रवियुतो नीचांशगो भिक्षुकः ॥

If Jupiter, Mars, Saturn or Mercury,
being depressed and obscured by the Sun's rays, occupy
the 11th, the 6th, the 12th, the 8th or the 5th bhava at

title: षष्टोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 30-31
षष्टोऽध्यायः
335
a person's birth, he will be a beggar. If Saturn in the
9th bhava be aspected by malefic planets and if Mercury
in conjunction with the Sun occupy in the 1st bhava a
Navamsa owned by its depression sign, there will be a
beggar born.
जीवज्ञशुक्ररविनन्दनभूमिपुत्रा
रन्ध्रारिरिःफसुतकर्मगता यदि स्यात् ।
लग्नेश्वरादतिबली व्ययभावनाथो
नीचस्थितो रत्रिकराभिहतो दरिद्रः ॥ ३० ॥
Sloka 30. If Jupiter, Mercury, Venus, Saturn and
Mars occupy the 8th, the 6th, the 12th, the 5th and the
10th bhavas in any order and if the lord of the 12th bha
va though depressed in position and obscured by the
Sun's rays be nevertheless superior to the lord of the
rising sign in strength, the person born will be a beggar.
NOTES
Venus Mere Sun
Mars
An example
Lagna Jupiter
Saturn
शुक्रार्यद्विजराजभूमितनया नीचस्थिता जन्मनि
व्योमाये नवमे कलत्रतनये जातो दरिद्रो भवेत् ।
लभे दानवपूजितेऽमरगुरौ पुत्रे धरानन्दने
लाभे रात्रिको तृतीयभवने नीचङ्गते भिक्षुकः ॥ ३१ ॥

title: Adhyaya
content:
336
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
Sloka 31. If at a person's birth, Venus, Jupiter, the Moon and Mars be in their depression signs and occupy four out of the six bhavas namely, the 1st, the 10th, the 11th, the 9th, the 7th and the 5th; that person will be indigent. When Venus occupies the 1st bhava Jupiter the 5th, Mars the 11th and the Moon the 3rd, each one of these bhavas being identical with the depression sign of its occupant planet, the person born will be a beggar.
NOTES.
Lagna Mars Mars
(1) (2)
Jupiter Jupiter
Moon Venus Moon Venus
Lagna
लग्ने चरे चरनर्वाशगतेऽसितेन
दृष्टे च नीचगुरुणा यदि भिक्षुकः स्यात् ।
जातो विनाऽमरपुरोहितलग्नराशिं
जीवे रिपुव्ययगते तु भवेदरिद्रः ॥ ३२ ॥
Sloka 32. When the lagna is a moveable sign and the rising Navamsa is also owned by a moveable Rasi and it is aspected by Saturn as well as by depressed Jupiter, the person born will be a beggar. The same will be the case when Jupiter occupies the 6th or the 12th bhava in a sign other than his own.

title: षष्टोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 33-36
षष्टोऽध्यायः
337
जातः स्थिरे लग्नगतेषु पापाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपगताश्च सर्वे ।
केन्द्राद्धहिस्थानगतास्तु सौम्या भिक्षाशनः स्यात्परपोषितश्च ॥३३॥
Sloka 33. When the lagna is an immoveable sign
and all the malefic planets are in Kendra and Trikona
positions while benefic ones occupy other than Kendra
positions the person born will live upon alms and will
owe his maintenance to other people.
चरे विलग्ने निशि सौम्यखेटास्त्रिकोणकेन्द्रोपगता नवीर्याः ।
खलग्रहाः केन्द्रबहिस्थिताश्चेद् भिक्षाशनं नित्यमुपैति जातः ॥३४॥
Sloka 34. If a moveable sign be the Lagna at night
time and if benefic planets be in Kendra and Trikona
places possessing no strength, the malefic ones occupying
positions other than Kendra, the person born will always
live by begging.
पापा नीचस्थानगाः पापकर्मा सौम्या नीचस्थानगा गूढपापः ।
जीवे नीचस्थानगे कर्मराशौ नीचे भौमे नन्दनस्थे तथैव ॥ ३५ ॥
Sloka 35. If the malefic planets be in their depres
sion signs at a person's birth, he will do sinful acts; if
the benefic planets occupy their depression signs, he
will keep his sins concealed; if Jupiter being depressed
occupy the 10th bhava or Mars be in the 5th bhava
depressed in position, the effect will be the same.
नीचांशगास्तुङ्गगृहोपयाता
जातस्य नीचे फलमाशु दद्युः ।
नीचंगतास्तुङ्गनवांशकस्थाः
सौम्यं फलं व्योमचराः प्रकुर्युः ॥ ३६ ॥
Sloka 36. Planets produce depression effects if
they occupy in their exaltation signs the Navamsa belong-
43
verses:
जातः स्थिरे लग्नगतेषु पापाः केन्द्रत्रिकोणोपगताश्च सर्वे ।
केन्द्राद्धहिस्थानगतास्तु सौम्या भिक्षाशनः स्यात्परपोषितश्च ॥३३॥

Sloka 33. When the lagna is an immoveable sign and all the malefic planets are in Kendra and Trikona positions while benefic ones occupy other than Kendra positions the person born will live upon alms and will owe his maintenance to other people.

चरे विलग्ने निशि सौम्यखेटास्त्रिकोणकेन्द्रोपगता नवीर्याः ।
खलग्रहाः केन्द्रबहिस्थिताश्चेद् भिक्षाशनं नित्यमुपैति जातः ॥३४॥

Sloka 34. If a moveable sign be the Lagna at night time and if benefic planets be in Kendra and Trikona places possessing no strength, the malefic ones occupying positions other than Kendra, the person born will always live by begging.

पापा नीचस्थानगाः पापकर्मा सौम्या नीचस्थानगा गूढपापः ।
जीवे नीचस्थानगे कर्मराशौ नीचे भौमे नन्दनस्थे तथैव ॥ ३५ ॥

Sloka 35. If the malefic planets be in their depression signs at a person's birth, he will do sinful acts; if the benefic planets occupy their depression signs, he will keep his sins concealed; if Jupiter being depressed occupy the 10th bhava or Mars be in the 5th bhava depressed in position, the effect will be the same.

नीचांशगास्तुङ्गगृहोपयाता
जातस्य नीचे फलमाशु दद्युः ।
नीचंगतास्तुङ्गनवांशकस्थाः
सौम्यं फलं व्योमचराः प्रकुर्युः ॥ ३६ ॥
Sloka 36. Planets produce depression effects if they occupy in their exaltation signs the Navamsa belong-

content:
338
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
ing to their depression signs; they produce exaltation
effects if in their depression signs they occupy the
Navamsa of their exaltation signs.
NOTES.
cf. सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
नीचस्थिता जन्मनि ये ग्रहेन्द्राः स्वोच्चांशागा राजसमानभाग्याः ।
उपस्थिता चेदपि नीचभागा ग्रहा न कुर्वन्ति तथैव भाग्यम् ॥
The following are some more दरिद्र yogas mentioned by यवनाचार्य.
लग्नाधीशो व्ययस्थो वै सक्रूरो वा विशेषतः ।
निर्बलोऽस्तं गताः सौम्या निर्द्रव्यो जायते नरः ॥
सर्कलकेन्द्रगताः खलखेचराः रिपुपराक्रमलाभगताः शुभाः ।
सकलवीर्यपराक्रमवर्जिताः सखल्यो (Sic) मनुजो खलु निर्धनः ।॥
लग्नाधिनायोऽय सुखाधिनाथः कर्माधिनाथोऽथ धनाधिपश्च ।
व्यये रिपौ कालमदे गृहे च गता विवीर्याः खलु निर्धनो जनः ॥
मपतिर्यदि शत्रुगतो नरः सकलसौख्यविनाशनसंयुतः ।
तनुपतिर्यदि सूर्यसमायुतस्तनयगोऽय खलग्रहसंयुतः ॥
लग्नाधिपे मृत्युगते विशेषमस्तं गतः कर्मपतिश्च पष्ठः ।
धनाधिपो द्वादशभावसंस्थः स एव जातो धनवर्जितश्च ॥
तनुपतिर्मदपश्च रिपुस्थितः सुतगताश्व खलाः सबलाः खलु ।
गुरुभृगू यदि चास्तमुपागतौ जगति सौख्यविवर्जितमानवः ॥
धनाधिपो मृत्युगतोऽत्र संस्थः क्रूरग्रहेणाथ विलोकितश्च ।
लग्नाधिपः षष्ठगतो विवीर्यो जातः पृथिव्यां खलु निर्धनश्च ॥
लग्नस्वामी हीनवीर्यो द्रव्यनाथोऽस्तगो यदा ।
केन्द्रगाः सबलाः क्रूरा दरिद्रो मानवो भवेत् ॥
सक्रूरं धनभं चैव क्रूरेणैव निरीक्षितम् ।
धनपो रविसंयुक्तो दरिद्रोपहतो नरः ।
सक्रूरो धनपश्यैव धनभं सौम्यसंयुतम् ।
verses:
नीचस्थिता जन्मनि ये ग्रहेन्द्राः स्वोच्चांशागा राजसमानभाग्याः ।
उपस्थिता चेदपि नीचभागा ग्रहा न कुर्वन्ति तथैव भाग्यम् ॥

लग्नाधीशो व्ययस्थो वै सक्रूरो वा विशेषतः ।
निर्बलोऽस्तं गताः सौम्या निर्द्रव्यो जायते नरः ॥

सर्कलकेन्द्रगताः खलखेचराः रिपुपराक्रमलाभगताः शुभाः ।
सकलवीर्यपराक्रमवर्जिताः सखल्यो (Sic) मनुजो खलु निर्धनः ॥

लग्नाधिनायोऽय सुखाधिनाथः कर्माधिनाथोऽथ धनाधिपश्च ।
व्यये रिपौ कालमदे गृहे च गता विवीर्याः खलु निर्धनो जनः ॥

मदपतिर्यदि शत्रुगतो नरः सकलसौख्यविनाशनसंयुतः ।
तनुपतिर्यदि सूर्यसमायुतस्तनयगोऽय खलग्रहसंयुतः ॥

लग्नाधिपे मृत्युगते विशेषमस्तं गतः कर्मपतिश्च षष्ठः ।
धनाधिपो द्वादशभावसंस्थः स एव जातो धनवर्जितश्च ॥

तनुपतिर्मदपश्च रिपुस्थितः सुतगताश्व खलाः सबलाः खलु ।
गुरुभृगू यदि चास्तमुपागतौ जगति सौख्यविवर्जितमानवः ॥

धनाधिपो मृत्युगतोऽत्र संस्थः क्रूरग्रहेणाथ विलोकितश्च ।
लग्नाधिपः षष्ठगतो विवीर्यो जातः पृथिव्यां खलु निर्धनश्च ॥

लग्नस्वामी हीनवीर्यो द्रव्यनाथोऽस्तगो यदा ।
केन्द्रगाः सबलाः क्रूरा दरिद्रो मानवो भवेत् ॥

सक्रूरं धनभं चैव क्रूरेणैव निरीक्षितम् ।
धनपो रविसंयुक्तो दरिद्रोपहतो नरः ।
सक्रूरो धनपश्यैव धनभं सौम्यसंयुतम् ।

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl, 36-37
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
339
धनस्वामी चास्तगतो मानवो द्रव्यवर्जितः ॥
धनाधिपो यदा षष्ठे मृत्युभेऽप्यथवा व्यये ।
सक्रूरं धनभं चैत्र निर्धनः खकु मानत्रः ॥
चतुष्टयं शुभरहित सक्रूरं कुजवर्जितम् ।
दशमं भवति तदा दारिद्र्येगैत्र पीडितः ॥
लाभषष्ठविगताः खलु सौम्याः द्रव्यनाथख चरोऽस्तगतश्चेत् ।
अस्तगौ गुरुतितौ तु लम्नपो द्वादशे हि नरो यदि निर्धनः ॥
लग्नाधीशो द्रव्यनाथश्च षष्ठे कर्माधीशः संयुतः पापखेटैः ।
सक्रूरं वे द्रव्यमे क्रूरदृष्टं दारिद्रो वै मानवो योगदृष्टे ॥
धनभं क्रूरसंयुक्तं क्रूरदृष्टं तथा पुनः ।
धनस्वामी तृतीये वै दारिद्रो नाम जायते ॥
पापाश्चतुषु केन्द्रेषु तथा पापो धने स्थितः ।
दारिद्रयोग जानीयात्स्ववंशस्य क्षयं करः ।॥
रविणा सहितो मन्दः शुक्रेण च युतो भवेत् ।
तदा दरिद्रयोगोऽयं सद्रत्र्यमपि शोषयेत् ॥
तस्य भङ्गोऽयम् ॥
सिंहे मेषे यदा भानुः सितमन्दयुतो भवेत् ।
गुरुसौम्यसमालोकी सधनी भवति ध्रुवम् ॥
॥ दरिद्रयोगफलम् ॥
निर्भाग्यो विकलेन्द्रियो विषमधीर्दारात्मजैर्निन्दितो
भिक्षाशी विषमस्थितो विषमवाक् शिश्नोदरे तत्परः ।
अन्यायार्जनतत्परस्त्वनुदिनं मात्सर्यवाक् कण्टकी
नित्यं स्यात्परदारसक्तहृदयो नीचोऽन्धमूको जडः ॥ ३७ ॥
Sloka 37. The characteristics of a person afflicted
with दरिद्रयोग (Daridrayoga) are such as these:-He is
verses:
धनस्वामी चास्तगतो मानवो द्रव्यवर्जितः ॥
धनाधिपो यदा षष्ठे मृत्युभेऽप्यथवा व्यये ।
सक्रूरं धनभं चैत्र निर्धनः खकु मानत्रः ॥
चतुष्टयं शुभरहित सक्रूरं कुजवर्जितम् ।
दशमं भवति तदा दारिद्र्येगैत्र पीडितः ॥

सक्रूरं वे द्रव्यमे क्रूरदृष्टं दारिद्रो वै मानवो योगदृष्टे ॥
धनभं क्रूरसंयुक्तं क्रूरदृष्टं तथा पुनः ।
धनस्वामी तृतीये वै दारिद्रो नाम जायते ॥
पापाश्चतुषु केन्द्रेषु तथा पापो धने स्थितः ।
दारिद्रयोग जानीयात्स्ववंशस्य क्षयं करः ।॥
रविणा सहितो मन्दः शुक्रेण च युतो भवेत् ।
तदा दरिद्रयोगोऽयं सद्रत्र्यमपि शोषयेत् ॥

तस्य भङ्गोऽयम् ॥
सिंहे मेषे यदा भानुः सितमन्दयुतो भवेत् ।
गुरुसौम्यसमालोकी सधनी भवति ध्रुवम् ॥

निर्भाग्यो विकलेन्द्रियो विषमधीर्दारात्मजैर्निन्दितो
भिक्षाशी विषमस्थितो विषमवाक् शिश्नोदरे तत्परः ।
अन्यायार्जनतत्परस्त्वनुदिनं मात्सर्यवाक् कण्टकी
नित्यं स्यात्परदारसक्तहृदयो नीचोऽन्धमूको जडः ॥

The characteristics of a person afflicted
with दरिद्रयोग (Daridrayoga) are such as these:-He is

title: प्रेष्ययोगाः
content:
340
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
generally an unlucky person; his organs of sense may
be defective; he is crafty; he is reproved and rated by
his family; he has to live by begging; he is in difficult-
ies; his speech is disagreeable; he is addicted to lust
and gluttony: he would earn money by foul means; he
daily gives vent to his spite and speaks pungent words;
his heart is always set on other people's wives; he is
mean; often times he is blind, mute and idiotic.
दरिद्रयोगे कलहप्रियः स्यात् कुष्ठी परेषां हितहत् कृतघ्नः ।
वाचालको भूसुरभक्तिहीनः कुदारयुक्तः कुनखी च जातः ॥ ३८ ॥
Sloka 38. A person born in a दरिद्रयोग (Daridra
yoga) is fond of quarrelling; he may be a leper; he
destroys what is beneficial to others; he is ungrateful
and given to boasting; he has no reverence for Brahma-
nas; he has a bad wife and afflicted with diseased ugly
nails.
॥ प्रेष्ययोगाः ॥
माने रवौ मन्मथगे निशीशे गेहे शनौ सोदरगे धराजे ।
लग्ने चरे देवगुरौ धनस्थे जातो निशायां परकार्यकृत् स्यात् ॥ ३९ ॥
Sloka 39. When the Sun is in the 10th bhava, the
Moon in the 7th, Saturn in the 4th, Mars in the 3rd,
the Lagna in a moveable sign and Jupiter in the 2nd
bhava, the person born in this yoga at night will be the
servant of another.
धर्मे भृगौ कामगते मृगाङ्के वाचस्पतौ वित्तविलग्नपे वा ।
रन्ध्रस्थिते भूतनये च कीर्त्या लग्ने स्थिरे प्रेष्यभवा भवन्ति ॥ ४० ॥
Sloka 40. When Venus occupies the 9th bhava,
the Moon the 7th, and when Jupiter is the lord of the
verses:
दरिद्रयोगे कलहप्रियः स्यात् कुष्ठी परेषां हितहत् कृतघ्नः ।
वाचालको भूसुरभक्तिहीनः कुदारयुक्तः कुनखी च जातः ॥

A person born in a दरिद्रयोग (Daridra
yoga) is fond of quarrelling; he may be a leper; he
destroys what is beneficial to others; he is ungrateful
and given to boasting; he has no reverence for Brahma-
nas; he has a bad wife and afflicted with diseased ugly
nails.

माने रवौ मन्मथगे निशीशे गेहे शनौ सोदरगे धराजे ।
लग्ने चरे देवगुरौ धनस्थे जातो निशायां परकार्यकृत् स्यात् ॥

When the Sun is in the 10th bhava, the
Moon in the 7th, Saturn in the 4th, Mars in the 3rd,
the Lagna in a moveable sign and Jupiter in the 2nd
bhava, the person born in this yoga at night will be the
servant of another.

धर्मे भृगौ कामगते मृगाङ्के वाचस्पतौ वित्तविलग्नपे वा ।
रन्ध्रस्थिते भूतनये च कीर्त्या लग्ने स्थिरे प्रेष्यभवा भवन्ति ॥

When Venus occupies the 9th bhava,
the Moon the 7th, and when Jupiter is the lord of the

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 41-43
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
341
2nd or the 1st bhava and when Mars is in the 8th and
the Lagna reported to be an immoveable sign, persons
destined to servitude are born.
श्रेष्यश्वरोदयपतौ निशि सन्धियाते
केन्द्रस्थिते यदि खलंयुचरे तु जातः ।
मन्देन्दुजीवभृगुजा दिवि केन्द्रकोणे
सन्धिस्थिता स्थिरविलग्नयुते तथा स्यात् ॥ ४१ ॥
Sloka 41. If at the birth of a person at night, the
lord of the mveable rising sign be in a sandhi and a
malefic planet occupy a Kendra, he will be a menial. If
Saturn, the Moon, Jupiter and Venus occupying during
the day a Kendra, or a Trikona position, be in a sandhi
and if the rising sign be an immoveable one, the person
born will be a menial likewise.
ऐरावतांशेन्द्रगुरौ ससन्धौ शीतयुतौ चोत्तमवर्गयुक्ते ।
केन्द्राद्धहिःस्थे निश्चि कृष्णपक्षे शुक्रे विलग्ने परकर्मजीवी ॥४२॥
Sloka 42. When Jupiter attaining an ऐरावांश
(Iravathamsa - vide Adhyaya 1, Sl. 47) occupies a san-
dhi and when the Moon possessed of an उत्तमवर्ग (Uttama
varga
vide Adhyaya 1, Sl. 45) is outside the Kendras
and when Venus is in the rising sign at a birth at night
during the dark half of a lunar month, the person born
is a menial.
प्रेष्यो भवेदरिसुखास्पदसन्धियाता
भूपुत्रदेवगुरुवासरनायकाश्चेत् ।
पापांशके शशिनि शोभनराशियुक्ते
जीवे विलग्नपयुते परकार्यकृत् स्यात् ॥ ४३ ॥
verses:
श्रेष्यश्वरोदयपतौ निशि सन्धियाते
केन्द्रस्थिते यदि खलंयुचरे तु जातः ।
मन्देन्दुजीवभृगुजा दिवि केन्द्रकोणे
सन्धिस्थिता स्थिरविलग्नयुते तथा स्यात् ॥ ४१ ॥

If at the birth of a person at night, the lord of the mveable rising sign be in a sandhi and a malefic planet occupy a Kendra, he will be a menial. If Saturn, the Moon, Jupiter and Venus occupying during the day a Kendra, or a Trikona position, be in a sandhi and if the rising sign be an immoveable one, the person born will be a menial likewise.
ऐरावतांशेन्द्रगुरौ ससन्धौ शीतयुतौ चोत्तमवर्गयुक्ते ।
केन्द्राद्धहिःस्थे निश्चि कृष्णपक्षे शुक्रे विलग्ने परकर्मजीवी ॥४२॥

When Jupiter attaining an ऐरावांश (Iravathamsa - vide Adhyaya 1, Sl. 47) occupies a sandhi and when the Moon possessed of an उत्तमवर्ग (Uttama varga - vide Adhyaya 1, Sl. 45) is outside the Kendras and when Venus is in the rising sign at a birth at night during the dark half of a lunar month, the person born is a menial.
प्रेष्यो भवेदरिसुखास्पदसन्धियाता
भूपुत्रदेवगुरुवासरनायकाश्चेत् ।
पापांशके शशिनि शोभनराशियुक्ते
जीवे विलग्नपयुते परकार्यकृत् स्यात् ॥ ४३ ॥

content:
342
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
Sloka 43. A person will be a menial if at his birth
Mars, Jupiter and the Sun occupy respectively the
sandhis of the 6th, the 4th and the 10th bhavas. If the
Moon occupying the Navamsa of a malefic planet be in
a benefic sign and if Jupiter be in conjunction with the
lord of the rising sign, the person born will live by
serving another.
मृगाननस्थे पुरुहूतवन्ये सपल भावाष्टमरिःफराशौ ।
रसातलस्थे हिमगौ विलग्नाज्जातः परप्रेष्यमुपैति नित्यम् ॥४४॥
Sloka 44. When Jupiter is in मकर (Makara) occupy-
ing the 6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava and when the
Moon is in the 4th bhava from the rising sign, the person
born has to be at another's bidding.
॥ प्रेष्ययोगफलम् ॥
पापात्मा कलहप्रियः कठिनवाक् भूदेवतादूषको
विद्याभाग्यविहीनदुष्टरसिको मात्सर्यकोपान्वितः ।
मिथ्यावादविनोदवश्चनरतः शिश्नोदरे तत्परः
कारुण्यास्थिर मानभङ्गिचतुरो योगे परप्रेष्यके ॥ ४५ ॥
Sloka 45. These are the characteristics of a person
born in the yoga called परंप्रेष्यक (Parapreshyaka-being at
another's beck and call). Such a person is generally
evil-minded; he is fond of quarrelling; he is harsh of
speech; he is a reviler of the Brahmana community; he
has a liking for people illiterate, he is indigent and
depraved; he is spiteful and wrathful; his pastime is
lying; he is deceitful, lustful and intemperate; he is
clever in simulating tenderness and false pride.
verses:

रसातलस्थे हिमगौ विलग्नाज्जातः परप्रेष्यमुपैति नित्यम् ॥४४॥

Sloka 44. When Jupiter is in मकर (Makara) occupy-
ing the 6th, the 8th or the 12th bhava and when the
Moon is in the 4th bhava from the rising sign, the person
born has to be at another's bidding.

कारुण्यास्थिर मानभङ्गिचतुरो योगे परप्रेष्यके ॥ ४५ ॥

Sloka 45. These are the characteristics of a person
born in the yoga called परंप्रेष्यक (Parapreshyaka-being at
another's beck and call). Such a person is generally
evil-minded; he is fond of quarrelling; he is harsh of
speech; he is a reviler of the Brahmana community; he
has a liking for people illiterate, he is indigent and
depraved; he is spiteful and wrathful; his pastime is
lying; he is deceitful, lustful and intemperate; he is
clever in simulating tenderness and false pride.

title: अङ्गहीनयोगः
content:
Sl. 46-48
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
343
॥ अङ्गहीनयोगः ॥
मेषे वृषे चापधरे विलने विकारदन्तो यदि पापदृष्टे ।
मन्दे मदस्थेऽहियुते कुजे वा बलैर्विहीनेऽङ्गविहीनवान् स्यात् ॥४६॥
Sloka 46. When the rising sign is मेष (Mesha),
वृषभ (Vrishabha) or धनुस (Dhanus) and is aspected by a
malefic planet, the person born will have tooth disease;
when Saturn occupies the 7th bhava and Mars is either
in conjunction with Rahu or is without strength, the
person born will be defective in limb.
of. होरारल
सप्तमे क्रूरसंदृष्टाः क्रूरा दन्तविकारदाः ।
पापेष्ईष्टेऽजगोचापलग्ने विकृतदन्तवान् ॥
लग्नाद्दशमगश्चन्द्रः सप्तमस्ये धरासुतः ।
द्विर्तायस्थानगो भानुरङ्गहीनो भवेन्नरः । ४७ ।।
Sloka 47. When the Moon is in the 10th bhava,
Mars in the 7th and the Sun in the 2nd, the person born
will lose some limb.
त्रिकोणगे ज्ञे विबलैस्तथापरै-
मुस्वाङ्गिहस्तद्विगुणस्तदा भवेत् ।
अवाग्गवीन्दावशु मैर्भसन्धिगैः
शुभेक्षितश्चेत् कुरुते गिरं चिरात् ॥ ४८ ॥
Sioka 48. When Mercury occupies the 5th or 9th
house from the Lagna and the other planets are weak,
the child will have two heads, four legs and four hands.
When the Moon occupies Vrishabha and malefics are in
the Riksha sandhies, the person born will be a mute.
If, under the above conditions, the Moon be aspected by
verses:
मेषे वृषे चापधरे विलने विकारदन्तो यदि पापदृष्टे ।
मन्दे मदस्थेऽहियुते कुजे वा बलैर्विहीनेऽङ्गविहीनवान् स्यात् ॥४६॥

When the rising sign is मेष (Mesha), वृषभ (Vrishabha) or धनुस (Dhanus) and is aspected by a malefic planet, the person born will have tooth disease; when Saturn occupies the 7th bhava and Mars is either in conjunction with Rahu or is without strength, the person born will be defective in limb.
सप्तमे क्रूरसंदृष्टाः क्रूरा दन्तविकारदाः ।
पापेष्ईष्टेऽजगोचापलग्ने विकृतदन्तवान् ॥

लग्नाद्दशमगश्चन्द्रः सप्तमस्ये धरासुतः ।
द्विर्तायस्थानगो भानुरङ्गहीनो भवेन्नरः । ४७ ।।

When the Moon is in the 10th bhava, Mars in the 7th and the Sun in the 2nd, the person born will lose some limb.
त्रिकोणगे ज्ञे विबलैस्तथापरै-
मुस्वाङ्गिहस्तद्विगुणस्तदा भवेत् ।
अवाग्गवीन्दावशु मैर्भसन्धिगैः
शुभेक्षितश्चेत् कुरुते गिरं चिरात् ॥ ४८ ॥

When Mercury occupies the 5th or 9th house from the Lagna and the other planets are weak, the child will have two heads, four legs and four hands. When the Moon occupies Vrishabha and malefics are in the Riksha sandhies, the person born will be a mute. If, under the above conditions, the Moon be aspected by

content:
344
बावकपारिआते
Adh. VI.
benefics, the child may get speech afterwards (after a
long time).
NOTES
First half.—The above result should not be predicted unless
the characteristic combinations mentioned are complete. If the
characteristics are incomplete, an inordinate largeness of the
organs named should be foretold. Some commentators take the
word त्रिकोण (Trikona) in the sloka to mean मूलत्रिकोण (Moolatrikona)
of Mercury, that is Kanya. But this has to be rejected on the
authority of गार्गि (Gargi) who distinctly says:—
बलहीनै ग्रहैः सर्वैनेवपञ्चमगे बुधे ।
द्विगुणाद्धि शिरोहस्तो भवत्येकोदरस्तथा ॥
Second half.—By the words "malefics are in the Riksha
Sandhies" it is to be understood that all the three malefics, viz.,
Saturn, Mars and the Sun are jointly or severally to be in the last
portion of any one or more of Kataka, Vrischika and Meena. By
the words "afterwards (after a long time)," nothing more is meant
than 'later than the ordinary time within which a child may be
naturally expected to speak-'
The last quarter of the sloka leads to the inference that such
Moon should also have malefic aspect to make the person mute.
This is supported by Gargi who says:—
कुलीरालि झषान्तस्यैः पापैश्चन्द्रे वृषोपगे ।
मूकः पापेक्षितैः सौम्यैश्चिरेण लभते गिरम् ॥
मिश्रदृष्टैर्यथावीर्य फलं बोध्यं मनीषिणा ॥
Unless therefore all the three malefics are thus placed and the
Moon has a malefic aspect, the prediction should not be made. If
there be only two malefics thus placed, then frugality or smallness
of speech, and if only one, wavering, slow or stammering speech
should be foretold. But if such Moon has the aspect of one or
more benefic planets, the person will begin to speak later than
when he would otherwise be naturally expected to speak. It must
thus be remembered that the aspect of malefics is also required to
make the native mute, and the aspect of benefics to counteract it.
verses:
बलहीनै ग्रहैः सर्वैनेवपञ्चमगे बुधे ।
द्विगुणाद्धि शिरोहस्तो भवत्येकोदरस्तथा ॥

कुलीरालि झषान्तस्यैः पापैश्चन्द्रे वृषोपगे ।
मूकः पापेक्षितैः सौम्यैश्चिरेण लभते गिरम् ॥
मिश्रदृष्टैर्यथावीर्य फलं बोध्यं मनीषिणा ॥

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
Sl. 49
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
345
सारावली
करैर्गृहसन्धिगतैः शशिनि वृषे भौमसौरिरविदृष्टे ।
मूकः सौम्यैईष्ट वाचे कालान्तरे वदति ॥
सौम्ये त्रिकोणसंस्थे लग्माच्छेषग्रहैर्बलविहीनैः ।
द्विगुणास्यपादहस्तो योगेऽस्मिन्नाहितो भवति गर्भः ॥
The word गवि (Gavi) in the sloka in the text may also nean
"in the house of speech," i.e., the second house from the Lagna.
This view is supported by स्कन्दहोरा (Skandahora) where it is laid
lown thus:
ऋक्षसन्धिगतैः पापैडेश्वमानो निशाकरः ।
द्वेधा गविष्ठो वाग्वानिमाधाने जनयेद्भवम् ॥
सौम्यक्षाशे रविजरुधिरौ चेत् सदन्तोऽत्र जातः
कुब्जः खर्थे शशिनि तनुगे मन्दमाहेयदृष्टे ।
पङ्गुर्मीने यमशशिकुजैर्वीक्षिते लग्नसंस्थे
सन्धौ पापे शशिनि च जडः स्यान्न चेत् सौम्यदृष्टः ॥ ४९ ॥
Sloka 49. (1) If Saturn and Mars ocruny the Rasis
or Navamsas owned by Mercury, the child will have
teeth at birth. (This refers to the time of conception].
(2) If the Moon be in the Lagna identical with
Kataka and aspected by Saturn and Mars, the child will
be a dwarf. [This also refers to the time of conception].
(3) If the आधानलग्न (Adhana Lagna) be Meena and is
aspected by Saturn, Mars and the Moon, either singly or
conjointly, the child will be short in stature (crippie).
(4) If a malefic planet in conjunction with the
Moon occupy a Riksha Sandhi (at the time of concep
tion), the child will be dull. These yogas take effect
only when their authors fail to have benefic aspect on
them.
44
verses:
करैर्गृहसन्धिगतैः शशिनि वृषे भौमसौरिरविदृष्टे ।
मूकः सौम्यैईष्ट वाचे कालान्तरे वदति ॥
सौम्ये त्रिकोणसंस्थे लग्माच्छेषग्रहैर्बलविहीनैः ।
द्विगुणास्यपादहस्तो योगेऽस्मिन्नाहितो भवति गर्भः ॥

The word गवि (Gavi) in the sloka in the text may also mean
"in the house of speech," i.e., the second house from the Lagna.
This view is supported by स्कन्दहोरा (Skandahora) where it is laid
down thus:
ऋक्षसन्धिगतैः पापैडेश्वमानो निशाकरः ।
द्वेधा गविष्ठो वाग्वानिमाधाने जनयेद्भवम् ॥

सौम्यक्षाशे रविजरुधिरौ चेत् सदन्तोऽत्र जातः
कुब्जः खर्थे शशिनि तनुगे मन्दमाहेयदृष्टे ।
पङ्गुर्मीने यमशशिकुजैर्वीक्षिते लग्नसंस्थे
सन्धौ पापे शशिनि च जडः स्यान्न चेत् सौम्यदृष्टः ॥ ४९ ॥

(1) If Saturn and Mars occupy the Rasis
or Navamsas owned by Mercury, the child will have
teeth at birth. [This refers to the time of conception].
(2) If the Moon be in the Lagna identical with
Kataka and aspected by Saturn and Mars, the child will
be a dwarf. [This also refers to the time of conception].
(3) If the आधानलग्न (Adhana Lagna) be Meena and is
aspected by Saturn, Mars and the Moon, either singly or
conjointly, the child will be short in stature (cripple).
(4) If a malefic planet in conjunction with the
Moon occupy a Riksha Sandhi (at the time of concep
tion), the child will be dull. These yogas take effect
only when their authors fail to have benefic aspect on
them.

content:
346
जातकपारिजाते
NOTES.
Adh. VI.
(1) In the case of actual birth under the above yoga, the native
will have often tooth trouble.
(2) In the case of a nativity, the above yoga holds good pro-
vided the Moon is in the Lagna and in Kataka. (See Brihat
Jataka-XX).
सारावली
क्ररेषु राशिसन्धिषु शशी न सौम्यैर्निरीक्ष्यते च जडः ।
बुधनवमभागसंस्थौ शनिभौमौ यदि सदन्तः स्यात् ॥
शशिनि विलग्ने कर्किणि कुजार्किदृष्ठेऽथवा कुब्जः ।
मीनोदये च दृष्टे कुजार्किंशशिभिः पुमान् भवति पञ्चः ।
व्यर्थी भवन्ति योगाः सौम्यग्रहवीक्षिताः सर्वे ॥
७
सौरशशाङ्कदिवाकरदृष्टे वामनको मकरान्त्यविलग्ने ।
धीनवमोदयगैश्च दृगाणैः पापयुतैरभुजाङ्घिशिरः स्यात् ॥ ५० ॥
Sloka 50. If the rising sign be the last Navamsa
of Makara and if it be aspected by Saturn, the Moon and
the Sun, the child will be a dwarf. If the last Navamsa
of Makara is rising with three malefics in the three
decanates of the Lagna bhava (the 2nd, 3rd and Ist
decanates), the child will be without arms, feet or head
as the case may be.
सारावली
NOTES.
वामनको मकरान्त्ये लग्ने रविचन्द्रसौरिभिर्दष्टे ।
भोमयुतो द्रेष्काणस्त्रिकोणलग्नेषु भेषु संदृष्टः ।
विभुजाङ्घिमस्तकः स्याच्छनिरविचन्द्रैर्वेदेद्गर्भः ॥
Another interpretation. If all the three malefics are in the 1st
decanate, the issue will be born without head. If they are in the
2nd decanate, it will be without shoulders; if the planets are in
the 3rd decanate, it will be without legs.
The words धीनवमोदयगैश्च डगाणेः पापैः have been interpreted thus:
"If Mars occupy the 1st, 2nd or 3rd Drekkana of the Lagna."
verses:
क्ररेषु राशिसन्धिषु शशी न सौम्यैर्निरीक्ष्यते च जडः ।
बुधनवमभागसंस्थौ शनिभौमौ यदि सदन्तः स्यात् ॥
शशिनि विलग्ने कर्किणि कुजार्किदृष्ठेऽथवा कुब्जः ।
मीनोदये च दृष्टे कुजार्किंशशिभिः पुमान् भवति पञ्चः ।
व्यर्थी भवन्ति योगाः सौम्यग्रहवीक्षिताः सर्वे ॥

सौरशशाङ्कदिवाकरदृष्टे वामनको मकरान्त्यविलग्ने ।
धीनवमोदयगैश्च दृगाणैः पापयुतैरभुजाङ्घिशिरः स्यात् ॥ ५० ॥

If the rising sign be the last Navamsa
of Makara and if it be aspected by Saturn, the Moon and
the Sun, the child will be a dwarf. If the last Navamsa
of Makara is rising with three malefics in the three
decanates of the Lagna bhava (the 2nd, 3rd and Ist
decanates), the child will be without arms, feet or head
as the case may be.
वामनको मकरान्त्ये लग्ने रविचन्द्रसौरिभिर्दष्टे ।
भोमयुतो द्रेष्काणस्त्रिकोणलग्नेषु भेषु संदृष्टः ।
विभुजाङ्घिमस्तकः स्याच्छनिरविचन्द्रैर्वेदेद्गर्भः ॥

Another interpretation. If all the three malefics are in the 1st
decanate, the issue will be born without head. If they are in the
2nd decanate, it will be without shoulders; if the planets are in
the 3rd decanate, it will be without legs.

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
SĮ. 51-52
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
347
But this is opposed to the opinion of गर्न (Garga) from whose
works the next sloka has been quoted.
लग्नद्रेकाणगो भौमः सौरसूर्येन्दुवीक्षितः ।
कुर्याद्विशिरसन्तद्वत् पञ्चमे बाहुवर्जितम् ॥ ५१ ॥
Sloka 51. Mars occupying the Lagna Drekkana
(लग्नद्रेक्काण) and aspected by the three planets Saturn, the
Sun and the Moon produces a headless child. The child
will be born armless if Mars occupy the Drekkana of
the 5th bhava and is aspected by the same three planets
as in the preceding case.
NOTES.
This sloka is from गर्मरोग (Garga Hora) where the reading is
slightly diflerent; viz., लग्ने ट्रेक्काणयो भौमः &c. In order to com-
plete the idea given in sloka 50 above, this has to be read with the
following first half of the next słoka in that work, viz.,
विपदं नवमस्थाने यदि सौम्यैनवीक्षितः ।
Its omission from the text must only be accidental. The
translation should therefore be thus:
Mars occupying the first (rising) Drekkana of the Lagna and
aspected by the Sun, the Moon and Saturu, produces a headless
child. The child will be born armless if Mars occupy the first
(rising) Drekkana of the 5th house and be aspected by the same
three planets. The child born will have no legs if Mars under
the same aspect occupy the first Drekkana of the 9th house from
the Lagna.
रविशशियुते सिंहे लग्ने कुजार्किनिरीक्षिते
नयनरहितः सौम्यासौम्यैः सवुद्धदलोचनः ।
व्ययगृहगतश्चन्द्रो वामं हिनस्त्यपरं रविः
अशुभगदिता योगा याप्या भवन्ति शुभेक्षिताः ॥ ५२ ॥
Sloka 52. When the rising sign is Simha and the
Sun and the Moon occupying it are aspected by Saturn
verses:
लग्नद्रेकाणगो भौमः सौरसूर्येन्दुवीक्षितः ।
कुर्याद्विशिरसन्तद्वत् पञ्चमे बाहुवर्जितम् ॥

Mars occupying the Lagna Drekkana
(लग्नद्रेक्काण) and aspected by the three planets Saturn, the
Sun and the Moon produces a headless child. The child
will be born armless if Mars occupy the Drekkana of
the 5th bhava and is aspected by the same three planets
as in the preceding case.
विपदं नवमस्थाने यदि सौम्यैनवीक्षितः ।

Mars occupying the first (rising) Drekkana of the Lagna and
aspected by the Sun, the Moon and Saturu, produces a headless
child. The child will be born armless if Mars occupy the first
(rising) Drekkana of the 5th house and be aspected by the same
three planets. The child born will have no legs if Mars under
the same aspect occupy the first Drekkana of the 9th house from
the Lagna.

रविशशियुते सिंहे लग्ने कुजार्किनिरीक्षिते
नयनरहितः सौम्यासौम्यैः सवुद्धदलोचनः ।
व्ययगृहगतश्चन्द्रो वामं हिनस्त्यपरं रविः
अशुभगदिता योगा याप्या भवन्ति शुभेक्षिताः ॥

When the rising sign is Simha and the
Sun and the Moon occupying it are aspected by Saturn

content:
348
बातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
and Mars, the child will be born sightless; if the same
Ascendant be aspected by benefic as well as malefic
planets, the person born will be blear-eyed. The Moon
occupying the 12th bhava from the Lagna will injure
the left eye while the Sun in the same position affects
the right one; these malefic yogas mentioned hitherto
can be escaped from in case the authors of such yogas
happen to be aspected by benefic planets.
८. सारावली
NOTES.
स्यातां यद्याधाने रविशशिनौ सिंहराशिगौ लग्ने ।
दृष्टौ कुज़सौरिभ्यां जात्यन्धः संभवति तत्र ॥
आग्नेयमौम्यदृष्टौ रविशशिनौ बुद्धदेक्षणं कुरुतः ।
नयनविनाशोऽपि यथा तथाऽधुना संप्रवक्ष्यामि ॥
व्ययभानगतश्चन्द्रो वामं चक्षुर्विनाशयति हीनः ।
सूर्यस्तथैव चान्यच्छुभदृष्टौ याज्यता नयतः ॥
Also सर्वार्थचिंतामणि
चन्द्रार्कसंयुक्तहरौ विलग्ने शन्यारदृष्टेऽक्षिविनाशमाहुः ।
शुभाशुभैर्बुद्धदलोचनः स्याच्छुभैर्न दोषः सहितेक्षणाभ्याम् ।।
Bhattotpala, the commentator, adds that if the Lagna सिंह
(Simba) be occupied by the Sun alone and be aspected by Mars
and Saturn, the child will be blind of the right eye. He will be
blind of the left eye if the Moon alone should occupy सिंह (Sinha)
and be aspected by Mars and Saturo.
See also sloka 56 infra.
The Sun, the Moon, Mars and Saturn are the planets that
cause blindness. See yoga mentioned in (1) this sloka, and (2)
Brihat Jataka XXIII-10 quoted under notes to sloka 58 infra.
The Sun in the 8th causes defective eye sight. (Vle Brihat
Jataka XX-3). The Sun and the Moon in the 6th
also cause blindness. (See Sloka 99 infra),
verses:
स्यातां यद्याधाने रविशशिनौ सिंहराशिगौ लग्ने ।
दृष्टौ कुज़सौरिभ्यां जात्यन्धः संभवति तत्र ॥
आग्नेयमौम्यदृष्टौ रविशशिनौ बुद्धदेक्षणं कुरुतः ।
नयनविनाशोऽपि यथा तथाऽधुना संप्रवक्ष्यामि ॥
व्ययभानगतश्चन्द्रो वामं चक्षुर्विनाशयति हीनः ।
सूर्यस्तथैव चान्यच्छुभदृष्टौ याज्यता नयतः ॥

If the Sun and Moon be in Leo at the Lagna, and aspected by Mars and Saturn, the person born will be blind.
If the Sun and Moon be aspected by fiery and earthy planets, they cause defective sight; I shall now explain how.
The Moon in the 12th house causes blindness of the left eye. The Sun also causes it, if aspected by other benefic planets.

चन्द्रार्कसंयुक्तहरौ विलग्ने शन्यारदृष्टेऽक्षिविनाशमाहुः ।
शुभाशुभैर्बुद्धदलोचनः स्याच्छुभैर्न दोषः सहितेक्षणाभ्याम् ।।

If the Moon and Sun be conjunct at the Lagna, and aspected by Saturn and Mars, they cause blindness of the eyes. If Mercury be associated with them, the sight will be defective, but if he be benefic, there will be no defect.

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
SI. 53-54

षष्ठोऽध्यायः

349

Mars and Saturn also cause blindness when they are similarly
placed (i.., when they are in the 6th and 8th).
cf. सारावली

वक्रो वा सौरो वा द्वादशभे वीक्षिते नयनहन्ता ||

शुरस्तब्धो मध्यदृष्टिर्विलग्ने
मेषे खोच्चे रोगदृक् सिंहगेऽर्के ।
रात्रावन्धस्तौलिगे निर्धनी स्यात्
कर्किण्यर्के लग्नगे बुद्धदाक्षः ।॥ ५३ ॥

Sloka 53. When the rising sign is मेष (Mesha)
and the Sun occupies it being in his exaltation, the
person born will be brave, obstinate and possessed of
moderate vision: if सिंह (Simha) take the place of मेष
(Mesha) in the previous case, the person born will have
eye disease; if the lagna be तुला (Thula) and the Sun
occupy it, the person born will be night-blind and poor;
and lastly if कटक (Kataka) be the lagna and have the Sun
in it, the person concerned will have inflamed eyes.

NOTES.
This sloka appears in जातकरल.

१० बृहज्जातक

शुग्स्तब्धो विकलनगनो निर्वृणोऽर्के तनुस्थे
मेषे सम्वस्तिमिरनयनः सिंहसंस्थे निशान्त्रः ।
नीचोऽन्धोऽस्वः शशिगृहगते बुद्धदाक्षः पतङ्गे
भूरिद्रव्यो नृपहृतधनो वक्तरोगी द्वितीये ॥

व्यये रवीन्दू युगपत्पृथक्स्थौ नेत्रे हरेतामपसव्यसव्ये ।
षछिद्रगाश्चाक्षि हरन्ति पापाः सव्यं रिपौ दक्षिणमष्टमस्थः ॥५४॥

Sloka 54. The Sun and the Moon occupying the
12th bhava whether conjointly or apart destroy the
verses:
वक्रो वा सौरो वा द्वादशभे वीक्षिते नयनहन्ता ||

शुरस्तब्धो मध्यदृष्टिर्विलग्ने
मेषे खोच्चे रोगदृक् सिंहगेऽर्के ।
रात्रावन्धस्तौलिगे निर्धनी स्यात्
कर्किण्यर्के लग्नगे बुद्धदाक्षः ।॥ ५३ ॥

When the rising sign is मेष (Mesha)
and the Sun occupies it being in his exaltation, the
person born will be brave, obstinate and possessed of
moderate vision: if सिंह (Simha) take the place of मेष
(Mesha) in the previous case, the person born will have
eye disease; if the lagna be तुला (Thula) and the Sun
occupy it, the person born will be night-blind and poor;
and lastly if कटक (Kataka) be the lagna and have the Sun
in it, the person concerned will have inflamed eyes.
शुग्स्तब्धो विकलनगनो निर्वृणोऽर्के तनुस्थे
मेषे सम्वस्तिमिरनयनः सिंहसंस्थे निशान्त्रः ।
नीचोऽन्धोऽस्वः शशिगृहगते बुद्धदाक्षः पतङ्गे
भूरिद्रव्यो नृपहृतधनो वक्तरोगी द्वितीये ॥

व्यये रवीन्दू युगपत्पृथक्स्थौ नेत्रे हरेतामपसव्यसव्ये ।
षछिद्रगाश्चाक्षि हरन्ति पापाः सव्यं रिपौ दक्षिणमष्टमस्थः ॥५४॥

The Sun and the Moon occupying the
12th bhava whether conjointly or apart destroy the

content:
350
जातकपारिजाते
Adh. VI.
right and left eye respectively; malefic planets in the
tth and the 8th bhava have the power to take away the
sight, the planet in the 6th destroying the left and that
in the 8th bhava destroying the right one.
८१. सर्वार्थर्चितागणि
दिनेशचन्द्रौ व्ययगौ तदानीमन्धो भवेत्सौम्यदृशा विहीनौ ।
युक्त तयोरन्यतरेण रिःफे काणो भवेत्सौम्यदृशा विहीने ॥
विकर्तनो लग्नगतोऽस्तगो वा दिनेशपुत्राभिश्तेक्षितश्चेत् ।
तस्येक्षणं दक्षिणमाशु हन्यादहिक्षमासूनुयुतस्तु वामम् ॥ ५५ ॥
Slaka 55. The Sun whether in the 1st or the 7th
bhava when in conjunction with or aspected by Saturn
will in no long time destroy the right eve of the person
concerned; but if the Sun be in conjunction with Rahu
and Mars, other conditions being the same as before, it
is the left eye that will suffer in this case.
दिनेशचन्द्रौ यदि रिःफयातौ सपत्नरन्ध्रव्ययगास्त्वसौम्याः ।
हन्याद‌रिस्थो नयनं हि वामं रन्ध्रस्थितो दक्षिणभागनेत्रम् ॥ ५६ ॥
Sloka 56. If malefic planets occupy the 6th, 8th
and 12th bhavas, those in the last being the Sun and the
Moon, the occupant of the 6th bhava will destroy the
left eye of the person born while the planet in the 8th
bhava will deal similarly with the eye on the right side.
Vide sloka 54 supra.
कुजे धनेशे निधने रवीन्द्वोः शत्रुव्ययस्थानगतेऽर्कजेऽन्धः ।
रन्ध्रावासानारिगते शशाङ्के शनौ सभौमे यदि नष्टनेत्रः ॥ ५७ ॥
Sloka 57. If Mars be the lord of the 2nd bhava,
if the 8th be occupied by the Sun and the Moon, and if
Saturn be in the 6th or the 12th bhava the person
verses:
दिनेशचन्द्रौ व्ययगौ तदानीमन्धो भवेत्सौम्यदृशा विहीनौ ।
युक्त तयोरन्यतरेण रिःफे काणो भवेत्सौम्यदृशा विहीने ॥

विकर्तनो लग्नगतोऽस्तगो वा दिनेशपुत्राभिश्तेक्षितश्चेत् ।
तस्येक्षणं दक्षिणमाशु हन्यादहिक्षमासूनुयुतस्तु वामम् ॥ ५५ ॥

The Sun whether in the 1st or the 7th
bhava when in conjunction with or aspected by Saturn
will in no long time destroy the right eve of the person
concerned; but if the Sun be in conjunction with Rahu
and Mars, other conditions being the same as before, it
is the left eye that will suffer in this case.
दिनेशचन्द्रौ यदि रिःफयातौ सपत्नरन्ध्रव्ययगास्त्वसौम्याः ।
हन्याद‌रिस्थो नयनं हि वामं रन्ध्रस्थितो दक्षिणभागनेत्रम् ॥ ५६ ॥

If malefic planets occupy the 6th, 8th
and 12th bhavas, those in the last being the Sun and the
Moon, the occupant of the 6th bhava will destroy the
left eye of the person born while the planet in the 8th
bhava will deal similarly with the eye on the right side.
कुजे धनेशे निधने रवीन्द्वोः शत्रुव्ययस्थानगतेऽर्कजेऽन्धः ।
रन्ध्रावासानारिगते शशाङ्के शनौ सभौमे यदि नष्टनेत्रः ॥ ५७ ॥

If Mars be the lord of the 2nd bhava,
if the 8th be occupied by the Sun and the Moon, and if
Saturn be in the 6th or the 12th bhava the person

title: षष्ठोऽध्यायः
content:
91. 58-59
षष्ठोऽध्यायः
351
born will be blind. If the Moon occupy the 8th, the
12th or the 6th bhava and Saturn be in conjunction
with Mars, the person born will be sightless.
This sloka is from जातकरल
NOTES.
The following are some more slokas from जात रत्न leading
to the same effect:—
नेत्रेश्वरै पापखगेन युक्त शन्यारयोगे गुलिकेन युक्ते ।
नेत्रे यदा पापबहुत्वयोगे यमेन दृष्टे स तु नष्टनेत्रः ॥
नेत्रेश्वरस्थांशपतौ सपापे पापग्रहक्षेत्रगते तथैव ।
नेत्राधिपे वासरनायके तु धरासुते वा गुलिकार्किदृष्टे ।।
षष्ठे चन्द्रेऽष्टमे भानौ लग्नादन्त्यगतेऽर्कजे ।
वित्तस्थानगते भौमे शक्रोऽप्यन्धो भवेध्रुवम् ॥ ५८ ॥
Sloka 58. If the Moon be in the 6th, the Sun in
the 8th, Saturn in the 12th and Mars in the 2nd, under
such a yoga, the person born, be he Indra himself, can-
not but be blind.
८१. बृहज्जातक
निधनारिधनव्ययस्थिता रविचन्द्रारयमा यथा तथा
बलवदुग्रहदोषकारणैर्मनुजानां जनयन्त्यनेत्रताम् ॥
Also जातकरल
षष्ठे राशी रन्ध्रगते च भानौ व्यये शनौ विस्तगते च भौमे ।
शुक्रश्च षष्ठाष्टधन्त्र्यये वा अन्धो भवत्येत्र भने शुभे वो ॥
लग्नेश्वरेण सहिते यदि वित्तनाथे
दुःस्थेऽक्षिनाशनमथास्फुजिदिन्दुयुक्ते ।
नेत्रेश्वरे तनुगते यदि नैशकोऽन्धः
खोश्च्चे शुभग्रहयुते न तथा वदन्ति ॥ ५९ ॥
verses:
born will be blind. If the Moon occupy the 8th, the
12th or the 6th bhava and Saturn be in conjunction
with Mars, the person born will be sightless.
नेत्रेश्वरै पापखगेन युक्त शन्यारयोगे गुलिकेन युक्ते ।

If the Moon be in the 6th, the Sun in
the 8th, Saturn in the 12th and Mars in the 2nd, under
such a yoga, the person born, be he Indra himself, can-
not but be blind.
